sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1388" key="a)dikokrisi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδῐκο-κρισία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n1388.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unjust judgement</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
